title: Desk Fan, USB Desktop Fan with LED Display & Long Battery Life, 100 Speeds, 90° Adjustable Head Tilt, 3-in-1 Powerful Table Fan for Bedroom, Kitchen, Office, Home,Camping (Dark Gray)
features: NEW-100-Speed Wind Settings: This desk fan offers 100 speed levels, allowing you to switch from a gentle breeze, to the air circulation mode, to a powerful airflow easily. Quickly adapt to various summer environments with ease. The intuitive button design simplifies adjusting the speed and monitoring the power status, catering to all your cooling needs.

NEW-Digital LED Display: The desk fan USB equipped with a clear LED display, this table fan shows real-time speed settings and remaining battery life, making it easy to monitor the fan's operation. The user-friendly interface enhances convenience, allowing you to adjust settings effortlessly for a more comfortable and efficient experience.

NEW-90°Rotation & Multi-Function Design: The Yokye desk top fan offers three installation options—it can be used as a wall-mounted fan, a desktop fan, or a hanging fan. The air circulator fan head can can be tilted upward by 90 degrees, allowing for flexible airflow direction control. Whether placed on a desk for personal cooling, mounted on a wall to save space, or hung for overhead ventilation, you can easily adjust the fan angle to suit your cooling needs.

NEW-Powerful Airflow & Quiet Operation: The Yokye rechargeable portable fan features a high-speed brushless motor, delivering wind speeds of up to 12m/s to enhance air circulation and improve indoor ventilation. Despite powerful airflow, this air circulator fan operates at an ultra-quiet 35dB, ensuring a peaceful and comfortable environment. Perfect for bedrooms, offices, and other noise-sensitive spaces.

NEW-Long Battery Life & USB Fast Charging: This table fans for bedroom with a built-in 5400mAh high-capacity battery, this fans for bedroom offer up to 4.5 to 20 hours of use (depending on the speed setting). The Type-C fast charging port makes recharging quick and convenient, perfect for outdoor activities, travel, and everyday use, ensuring you enjoy a lasting cooling experience wherever you go.
description: Product Description Why Choose the Yokye USB Desk Fan? The Yokye 3-in-1 desk fan offers many installation options—desktop, hanging...,making it suitable for the kitchen, bedroom, office, and outdoor spaces. This USB desk fan features 100 adjustable wind speeds, powerful airflow, and a fan head that tilts up to 90° upward for precise air circulation. The intuitive LED display and one-button control ensure easy operation. This table fan for bedroom powered by a 5400mAh battery runs for about 4.5 to 20 hours on a single charge, minimizing the need for frequent recharging. With over 360,000 units sold in 2024, this strong desk fan is a trusted choice for homes and offices, known for its outstanding quality and performance. 100-Speed Fan, 90° Tilt & Powerful Airflow for Extensive Coverage The Yokye office desk fan features a 90° upward tilt and powerful airflow, reaching speeds of 39ft+/s for fast and efficient cooling. The powerful table fan with stronger airflow and wider coverage than traditional fans, it ensures full-range cooling to keep you comfortable in any space. 3-in-1 Multifunctional Desk Fan This multifunctional powerful desktop fan can be used as a table fan, ceiling fan, or wall-mounted fan. However, for better stability and convenience, we recommend using it as a table or ceiling fan. Wall mounting is only suitable for smooth surfaces like glass or tiles and may require more complex installation. Safety Net & Non-Slip Base for Stability This USB desk fan features a protective safety net, non-slip pads for stability, and a built-in hook for optional wall or shelf hanging, combining safety with versatile use. 7-Blade USB-C Powerful Fan This usb c desk fan's 7-blade design outperforms traditional 3-blade fans, delivering more stable, and powerful airflow. Its precision-engineered blade angles and layout enhance air circulation, ensuring faster and more comfortable cooling indoors. 4.5~20 H Long Battery Life & Fast Charging The Yokye usb desktop fan equipped with a large 5400mAh battery, delivering about 4.5 to 20 hours of runtime to suit all-day use. These bed fans support Type-C fast charging, fully charging in 3 hours. Additionally, with multiple charging options available, it ensures a flexible and efficient charging experience. I mportant Tip： 1. Pls fully charge the desk fan before first use to ensure optimal battery performance ! ! ! 2. To protect battery life, please use a 5V⎓2A charger. Avoid fast chargers (9V/12V) ! ! ! Safe & Reliable The Yokye powerful fan is certified with CE, RoHS, and FCC, ensuring safety and reliability in any environment. Compliant with global standards, and this bedroom fan offers high-quality, safe, and dependable performance for your peace of mind. Suitable for Multi-Purpose Use The Yokye laptop table fan is perfect for summer: Camping Fan – Portable, hangable, and long-lasting, ideal for outdoor adventures. Bedroom Fan – Provides a refreshing breeze for workouts or relaxation. Kitchen Fan – Powerful airflow keeps you cool while cooking. Office Fan – Stylish design with USB charging enhances productivity.
